Build Smarter. Ship Faster. Powered by AI.

Devflow AI brings planning, coding, project tracking, docs, reviews, and analytics into one polished workspace for modern product teams.

$ devflow ai plan --sprint
Generated 7 tasks, 3 tests, 2 deploy checks
$ npm run build
Ready in 1.8s

Features

Everything developers need to keep flow.

Explore Features

AI Pairing

Plan, code, summarize, and review work with context-aware AI assistance.

Learn More

Developer Dashboard

Track projects, tasks, deployments, health, and velocity in one workspace.

Learn More

Code Workspace

A VS Code-inspired interface with file explorer, tabs, terminal, and run actions.

Learn More

Workflow Automation

Move ideas through AI, development, review, and deploy pipelines.

Learn More

Analytics

Area charts, progress rings, heat maps, and operational insights built for teams.

Learn More

Secure by Default

Clear permission boundaries, audit-friendly activity, and team controls.

Learn More
AI ChatStreaming
Explain the deploy risk for the payment refactor.

Risk is moderate. I found three impacted routes, two migration checks, and one rollback path.

AI Showcase

Chat, review, document, and plan with project context.

Markdown responses with code blocks Regenerate, stop, copy, and cite actions Chat history grouped by project

Can I use light mode?

Yes. The interface is designed around polished dark mode with light mode support, responsive layouts, and accessible controls.

Does it support teams?

Yes. The interface is designed around polished dark mode with light mode support, responsive layouts, and accessible controls.

Can AI read project context?

Yes. The interface is designed around polished dark mode with light mode support, responsive layouts, and accessible controls.

Is this production-ready UI?

Yes. The interface is designed around polished dark mode with light mode support, responsive layouts, and accessible controls.
